title: Electric Fly Catcher, Portable Bug Zapper, 4000mAh Rechargeable Mosquito Killer, 2 in 1 Killer with UV Lamp And Lighting Lamp,360° Attract Zap Flying Insect For Indoor Outdoor, Backyard Camping
bullet_points: Effective Fly Catcher Indoor: The electric fly zapper is equipped with high-intensity UV rays, emits a 365nm wavelength, which has been scientifically proven to be highly attractive to insects. Flies, mosquitoes and other small bugs cannot resist approaching the light source and will be zap immediately.

Quiet Mosquito Killer Lamp: The electric fly killer lamp only makes a zapping noise (20 dB max) when a bug touch electronic grid. No extra noise, no-chemical, no smoke and no radiation, quiet and healthy choice for you and your family. This fly killer has night light mode and electric fly zapper mode, which can be interchangeably switched. Set the mosquito killer lamp in restaurant or bedroom is also perfect.

Safe and Low Maintenance Bug Zapper: This electric insect killer adopt top-notch ABS as the cage, with less than 8mm intervals to prevent touching, fireproof and anti-fragment. The trays will collect mosquitoes and fruit flys bodies. You can easily remove and install the trays to clean the fly zapper electric lamp, just twist the bottom tray and clean with a soft brush.

Rechargeable Fly Trap: This upgraded rechargeable fly zapper is user-friendly and only use one button to control the entire unit. The electric mosquito light is equipped with a 2000mAh rechargeable battery and charged by USB cable. Full charging time is about 3hrs. It can last up to 16 hours when using bug zapper mode, and around 60 hours for lighting mode.

Perfect for Indoor Outdoor Activities: The fly traps indoor for home use has 360°all round UV light and cover with area up to 120Sq. This fly trap can stand freely. It is not only perfect for your kitchen and bedroom, but also suits for your backyards, garden, RV. Portable and USB charging design also allows you take the insect killer with your BBQ, camping, picnic, pool party and other outdoor activities.
